home.subtitle: Everything a dental student needs in one place, organized by your academic year and subjects.
home.select_year: Select Your Academic Year to Begin
home.delivery_tripoli_desc: Directly to the Faculty of Dentistry, University of Tripoli.
home.delivery_libya_desc: Fast and secure delivery to all cities and regions.
home.cod_desc: Pay in cash after inspecting your clinical dental tools yourself.

years.y1_desc: Tooth morphology, carving, dental materials, and pre-clinical carving labs.
years.y2_desc: Phantom head lab preparation, complete dentures, and restorative setups.
years.y3_desc: Endodontics cleaning, root canal files, and periodontics instrumentation.
years.y4_desc: Oral surgery exodontia tools, anesthesia syringes, and removable ortho appliances.
